title: Category (Platform) Schema
description: Code-side declaration for a fetcher category, at fetchers/_categories/<name>.yaml. All fields optional; an empty file is valid.

config_schema.description: Config shared across every fetcher in this category. Each value declares a field; when it has an `env`, the runner injects the resolved value as that env var for every fetcher in the category.

passthrough_env.description: Default ambient env vars the runner lets through its whitelist for this platform. A manifest's platforms.<category>.auth.passthrough_env adds to this set.
